working_on: MemPalace audit cleanup + improvements per approved plan at ~/.claude/plans/mempalace-structure-and-use-structured-sutherland.md. Defers original S-0032 Phase 4 build-readiness gate exercise to S-0033.
outcome_summary: 10-item MemPalace audit cleanup landed. Fixed actual cause of silent auto-capture breakage since S-0002 (mempalace-hook-wrapper.sh PATH fallback to ~/Library/Python/3.9/bin/). Corrected the inflated 1/42 = 2.4% compliance metric across ADR 0043 + ENGINE_LOG + STATE.md (cross-room compliance was at least ~17%, not 2.4% — the original count missed legacy `general`-room decision drawers). Adopted diary discipline (Improvement F): mempalace_diary_write at shutdown step 6 + diary_read at boot step 3b + diary_skipped soft-warn key wired into ADR 0042 persistent-warn surface; first diary entry written this session under wing_claude. Added pushback/lesson tags + room-targeting conventions (Improvement G + B); engine/scheduled_audits.json mechanism with S-0042 entry for tag adoption check; SessionStart hook reads it. Migrated 10 legacy ADR-companion drawers from general → decisions room; post-adr-write hook now detects wrong-room filings. Stopped recommending mempalace mine docs/ in install procedure (Improvement E). Extended health_check.py with audit_mempalace category (Improvement D) — counts decisions-room drawers vs ADRs, pushback/lesson tag adoption with Tags-line filter, diary skip rate; 16 new tests, 62/62 passing, ruff + mypy --strict clean. Cadence tightened 30 → 10 per user direction (rationale: the silent failures this audit surfaced make 30-session intervals too sparse; raise back when project shows consistent low-action audits) — ADR 0022 Consequences amendment + carrier sweep across 14 files. Cold-context review pass surfaced 2 real findings (module docstring `four categories` → five; missing tests for new MemPalace category); both addressed in-session. Pre-commit hook bug noted (validate.py portion returns 0 even when subsequent ruff/mypy hard-fail block reports non-zero) — flagged in commit message for follow-up. 11 commits this session including eager-claim. Validator clean: 14 checks, 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns. ADR count unchanged at 44 (42 Accepted + 2 Superseded; 11 engine + 33 product) — only amendments to 0022, 0042, 0043, 0044. MemPalace state: 485 drawers across 5 rooms (general 330, operations 88, decisions 55, foundation-planning-s0001 10, s0003-adr-collection 2). Three feedback memories saved to user memory: no-pilot-wait-and-see, defer-indefinitely-is-pointless, session-count-estimation. Next session work item: S-0033 Phase 4 build-readiness gate exercise (the originally-planned S-0032 work, deferred). First post-tightening cadence trigger fires at S-0040.
